name: habitica-todos
title: Habitica ToDos
description: Unofficial extension to view and create ToDo's for Habitica

preferences.name: apiUserId
preferences.title: Habitica User ID
preferences.description: Your Habitica User ID (found in Settings → API)

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: Habitica API Token
preferences.description: Your Habitica API Token (found in Settings → API)

commands.name: view-tasks
commands.title: View Tasks
commands.description: View, check, edit, delete, and manage sub-task checklists for your Habitica To-Dos
commands.subtitle: Habitica

commands.name: create-task
commands.title: Create Task
commands.description: Quickly create a new Habitica task
commands.subtitle: Habitica

commands.name: view-dailies
commands.title: View Dailies
commands.description: View, check, and edit your Habitica dailies
commands.subtitle: Habitica

commands.name: view-habits
commands.title: View Habits
commands.description: View, score, and edit your Habitica habits
commands.subtitle: Habitica

commands.name: view-profile
commands.title: View Profile
commands.description: View stats, cast class skills, allocate stat points, rest in the tavern, and manage quests
commands.subtitle: Habitica

commands.name: view-inventory
commands.title: View Inventory
commands.description: View, hatch, feed, sell, equip, and open mystery items in your Habitica inventory
commands.subtitle: Habitica

commands.name: view-shop
commands.title: View Shop
commands.description: View and purchase custom rewards and in-game items
commands.subtitle: Habitica

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the `prepublishOnly` script and rerun `npm publish` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use `npm run publish` instead.

" && exit 1

author: Sacrachan
